behavior_patterns.description: Config says disabled but runtime enforces
behavior_patterns.error_message: Exec approval is required, but chat exec approvals are not enabled on Telegram
behavior_patterns.training_goal: Ensure config/runtime consistency in internal agent

behavior_patterns.description: Shell builtins allowed, external binaries blocked
Gateway restart doesn't apply config changes
behavior_patterns.training_goal: Ensure internal agent state persists across restarts
Implement timeout handling and fast approval paths

behavior_patterns.description: Web UI terminal allows interactive approval
behavior_patterns.evidence: Human directed to use Web UI for approval-needing commands
behavior_patterns.training_goal: Support multiple approval channels in internal agent

behavior_patterns.evidence: Script creation, config updates work without approval
behavior_patterns.training_goal: Allow low-risk operations without approval in internal agent

workarounds.description: Package commands as executable scripts in /root/
workarounds.training_implication: Internal agent should support script-based task submission

workarounds.description: Use Web UI terminal for interactive approval
workarounds.training_implication: Internal agent should support multiple approval interfaces

workarounds.description: Limit to read/write/edit operations that bypass approval
workarounds.training_implication: Internal agent should allow file operations without approval

failure_modes.description: Config says one thing, runtime does another

failure_modes.mitigation: Implement timeout handling and retry logic
